articles.title: Players on the beach? Why lack of motivation is difficult to deal with

articles.title: Vibrant and victorious - Villa ready to end 30-year trophy drought
articles.summary: When Unai Emery arrived at Aston Villa he declared he wanted to win trophies. He is now just a game away from silverware after a crushing Europa League semi-final win against Nottingham Forest.

articles.title: Glasner's long Palace goodbye sets up 'perfect' finale
